---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: minty
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */

.navbar{
  background-color:#0b3d2e !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid #14532d;
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:white !important;
  font-weight:600;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#bbf7d0 !important;
}

/* ===== GENERAL ===== */

body{
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #eefbf3, #dff5e7);
  font-family:'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  padding-top:12px !important;
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */

.hero{
  background: linear-gradient(135deg,#14532d,#22c55e);
  color:white;
  padding:60px 40px;
  border-radius:22px;
  text-align:center;
  margin-bottom:24px;
  box-shadow:0px 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:3rem;
  font-weight:800;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}

.hero p{
  max-width:720px;
  margin:auto;
  font-size:1.05rem;
  line-height:1.7;
  opacity:0.96;
}

/* ===== CARDS ===== */

.card-box{
  background:white;
  border-radius:18px;
  padding:26px;
  box-shadow:0px 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  border:1px solid #dcfce7;
  margin-bottom:18px;
  transition:0.25s ease;
}

.card-box:hover{
  transform:translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow:0px 8px 20px rgba(34,197,94,0.14);
}

.card-box h2{
  color:#166534;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}

/* ===== INFO TAGS ===== */

.tag{
  display:inline-block;
  background:#dcfce7;
  color:#166534;
  padding:8px 14px;
  border-radius:999px;
  margin:5px;
  font-size:0.92rem;
  font-weight:600;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */

.footer{
  text-align:center;
  margin-top:28px;
  padding:12px;
  color:#166534;
  font-size:0.95rem;
}

</style>

::: {.hero}

My Assignments

Assignments and analytical works developed for the EMU430 Data Analytics course.

This section contains coursework, data analysis projects, visualizations, and reports created throughout the semester.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Course Information

Course: EMU430 – Data Analytics
Term: Spring 2026

This page showcases my assignments, analytical approaches, and project outcomes developed during the course.

Please use the navigation menu to explore individual assignments and related works.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Topics Covered

<span class="tag">Data Cleaning</span>
<span class="tag">Visualization</span>
<span class="tag">Statistical Analysis</span>
<span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
<span class="tag">Exploratory Data Analysis</span>
<span class="tag">Reporting</span>

:::

::: {.card-box}

About These Assignments

The assignments focus on applying analytical thinking and data-driven methodologies to real-world datasets.

Each project includes:

Data preprocessing and preparation
Exploratory analysis
Statistical interpretation
Visualization techniques
Analytical reporting

The goal is to improve both technical and presentation skills in data analytics.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Latest Update

The most recent update to this page was made on 04/04/2026.

More assignments and analytical reports will be added throughout the semester.

:::

<div class="footer">

Made with 💚 using R and Quarto

</div> ```
